name: Customer.io
description: Monitor Customer.io marketing automation for user access and data handling compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Customer.io at https://fly.customer.io
2. Go to Settings → Account Settings → API Credentials
3. Create an App API key
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: App API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Customer.io Settings → API Credentials. Use the App API key (not tracking API key).

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Customer.io workspace users and their roles

checks.name: Data Masking
checks.description: Verifies Customer.io account data handling and suppression settings
